utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: (1) health_coverage (physical and mental health insurance with costs), (2) property_coverage (home/contents insurance with costs), (3) travel_coverage (travel insurance with costs), (4) additional_services (any enhancement services with costs), and (5) total_budget (complete monthly/annual cost breakdown). The final coverage plan includes all these 5 main items, each fully specified with detailed descriptions and explicit cost references (all tied to €950/month total and an annual breakdown). Therefore, all required items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes multiple categories. For physical health, it describes 'Premium executive health coverage with immediate specialist access, cardiovascular monitoring, cholesterol management, allergy emergency coverage, preventive care, wellness programs.' This corresponds to a top-tier plan such as the 'EliteCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.physical_health, rated 10. For mental health, the plan mentions 'comprehensive mental health coverage including stress management programs, family therapy, crisis intervention,' which matches 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' under primary_health_coverage.mental_health, rated 10. For property coverage, the plan references 'Enhanced property coverage with €170,000 limit, luxury items covered, business equipment protection, liability protection, temporary accommodation,' which aligns with 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' under property_protection.home_content, rated 10. For travel coverage, the 'Global executive travel coverage with 24/7 emergency coordination' corresponds to 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance, rated 10, and 'International coverage for adult children' fits within the same premium tier. Additional services include 'concierge medical services' and 'executive protection,' which relate to the 'Premium Insurance Membership' and 'Insurance Portfolio Management' from general_services, both rated 10. Hence, the mapped ratings are derived from the best fit with the ground truth premium-level offerings.
